notes: No federal VAT. Sales tax is levied at the state level and varies by state (0% in OR, NH, MT, DE, AK; up to ~10% combined state+local elsewhere). Freelancers typically don't charge sales tax on services — but some states tax specific services. Confirm per state before invoicing.
Hong Kong has no VAT, GST, or sales tax. Invoices do not include consumption tax. Income is taxed via profits tax or salaries tax at assessment, not at the invoice.

GST is 9% since 1 Jan 2024 (raised from 8%). Registration required if taxable turnover exceeds S$1M in a 12-month period; optional below the threshold. Exports of services to overseas clients are zero-rated.

Standard rate 20%, reduced rate 5% (e.g., children's car seats, home energy). VAT registration required if taxable turnover exceeds £90,000 (2024/25 threshold); voluntary below. Services to overseas business customers usually outside scope — apply place-of-supply rules.
